privileged_info_summary: The square_crop task requires an agent to crop a landscape image (1000x600 pixels) downloaded from Unsplash to create a perfect 1:1 aspect ratio square using GIMP's crop tool. The task uses real images from Unsplash (specifically photo IDs 1441974231531-c6227db76b6e and 1506905925346-21bda4d32df4). The environment is 'example.gimp_env@0.1' with 1920x1080 screen resolution. Task parameters: 90-second timeout, 6 maximum steps, sparse reward. Success requires meeting at least 4 out of 5 criteria (75% threshold): square dimensions (±2px tolerance), 1:1 aspect ratio (±2% tolerance), actual cropping occurred, minimum 100px dimension, and 5% area reduction. Verifier function check_square_crop validates the output image against these criteria.
